skills.name: Sekhmet
skills.description: Uses a cube to form a shield. When hit by a melee skill attack, it retaliates with magic.

effects: [Mertis Reassurance]
Duration: 120s
Applies a powerful magical barrier that ignores damage equal to maximum HP
When destroyed by skill: Inflicts [Apocalypse] equal to the skill level of [Sekhmet]
When hit by melee skill: Inflicts [Mertis Nagging] Lv. +1
When hit by a skill while this skill is casting, repressing skill counters enemy
On successful retaliation hit: [Mertis Nagging] is applied
Skill Damage increases by 1.5x to enemies with [Mertis Nagging]
40% Chance to remove an random buff from enemy
